name: RPSG Ventures Limited
summary: CESC Ventures Limited owns, operates, invests, and promotes business in the fields of information technology, business process outsourcing, real estate, entertainment, and fast moving consumer goods in India. It offers application development and management, setup and operations and maintenance of IT infrastructure, cyber security management, and IT consultancy services; and business process outsourcing in the field of customer interaction management, data and transaction processing, collections management, consulting, and analytics. The company also provides packaged snacks under the TOO YUMM! and Evita brands; and various Ayurvedic formulations under the Dr. Vaidya's brand name, as well as wellness products and supplements for immunity, energy, sexual wellness, weight management, hair and skin care, and others. In addition, it operates shopping malls; and restaurants under the brand name of Waffle Wallah and Bombay Toastee brands. As of March 31, 2020, it operated 24 restaurant outlets. The company was formerly known as RP-SG Business Process Services Limited and changed its name to CESC Ventures Limited. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Kolkata, India.
